nl_query: Which evaluation policies are currently effective for boards that have at least one script with a pending revaluation request, and show the policy scope, deviation threshold, and review requirement.
failed_sql: SELECT ep.id AS policy_id, ep.course_id, ep.board_id, ep.deviation_threshold, ep.review_required FROM evaluation_policy ep JOIN revaluation_request rr ON ep.id = rr.evaluation_policy_id WHERE rr.approval_status = 'PENDING' GROUP BY ep.id, ep.course_id, ep.board_id, ep.deviation_threshold, ep.review_required
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): revaluation_request.evaluation_policy_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
